aboutme: Hello, world! My name is Matheus Pizani. I'm a Full-Stack developer and 6th-semester Computer Science student with a strong passion for web development! I love challenges and I'm always looking to learn something new, whether it's a technology, a tool, or a different way to solve problems. I truly believe technology can turn ideas into amazing experiences — and that's exactly what keeps me motivated to keep coding every single day.
recipeManagerDescription: Recipe Manager is a web application designed to help you better organize your kitchen, manage your pantry, and create amazing recipes using the ingredients you have on hand — all with the help of cutting-edge technology and artificial intelligence (Gemini API) to generate creative dishes!
inventoryAndCustomerManagementDescriptio: Web system for a food industry company (KLG), making it easier to control products, sales, and customer information efficiently and in an organized way.
URLShortenerDescription: Web system to shorten URLs, making it easier to share long links in a practical and efficient way.
guestManagerDescription: Web application to manage event guests. Guests can confirm their attendance through the site, and the birthday person can monitor the list via an admin page protected by a password.
